newsapp.apps¶

Application configuration for the News 24/7 app.

Classes

NewsappConfig

Configure the Django app and load signal handlers on startup.

  • ready: Import signal handlers when the application starts.

newsapp.forms¶

Form classes used by the News 24/7 web interface.

Classes

LoginForm

Authenticate a user from the login page.

RegisterForm

Register a new user with an email address and role selection.

ArticleForm

Create or edit a news article from the web interface.

NewsletterForm

Create or edit a newsletter and attach selected articles.

newsapp.models¶

Database models for the News 24/7 application. This module defines the custom user model, publisher records, articles, newsletters, and the approval log used by the API workflow.

Classes

CustomUser

Application user with role-based access and optional subscriptions.

  • clean: Validate that only reader accounts can keep publisher and journalist subscriptions.
  • save: Persist the user and clear role-incompatible relationship fields. The brief asks for reader-only subscription fields to be effectively absent for journalists and journalist-specific publication relations to be absent for readers. In Django, reverse relations cannot literally be set to None, so this method keeps the stored data equivalent by clearing reader subscriptions for all non-reader roles. The journalist publication fields remain reverse relations and naturally resolve to empty querysets for non-journalists.
  • is_reader: Return True when the user is assigned to the reader role.
  • is_editor: Return True when the user is assigned to the editor role.
  • is_journalist: Return True when the user is assigned to the journalist role.

Publisher

News publisher with assigned editors and journalists.

Article

News article submitted by a journalist and optionally tied to a publisher.

  • clean: Validate that each article is authored by a user with the journalist role.
  • mark_approved: Approve the article and store approval metadata.
  • __str__: Return the human-readable article title.

Newsletter

Curated collection of articles created by journalists or editors.

  • __str__: Return the newsletter title for templates and admin screens.

ApprovedArticleLog

Internal API log for approved article events.

  • __str__: Return a readable label for the approval log entry.

newsapp.permissions¶

Custom permission helpers used by the web and API layers.

Classes

IsJournalist

Allow access only to effective journalists.

  • has_permission: Return True when the request user is a journalist.

IsEditor

Allow access only to effective editors.

  • has_permission: Return True when the request user is an editor.

IsEditorOrJournalist

Allow access to editors and journalists.

  • has_permission: Return True when the request user is an editor or journalist.

Functions

  • user_in_group: Return whether the authenticated user belongs to the named group.
  • is_effective_editor: Return whether a user should be treated as an editor.
  • is_effective_journalist: Return whether a user should be treated as a journalist.

newsapp.serializers¶

Serializers for the News 24/7 REST API.

Classes

UserSerializer

Represent a user in API responses.

PublisherSerializer

Represent a publisher in API responses.

ArticleSerializer

Validate and serialize article data for list, detail, and create views.

NewsletterSerializer

Serialize newsletter records and their linked articles.

ApprovedArticleLogSerializer

Serialize the internal approved-article log records.

newsapp.views¶

Views for the News 24/7 web interface and REST API.

Classes

HomeView

Render the login page and redirect authenticated users to the dashboard.

AppLogoutView

Support logout requests from both GET links and POST forms.

  • get: Allow logout from the navbar link as well as POST submissions.

ArticleListCreateAPIView

List approved articles or create a new article via the API.

  • get_queryset: Return approved articles with related author and publisher data preloaded.
  • get_permissions: Allow authenticated reads and restrict article creation to journalists.
  • perform_create: Create a new article and attach the currently authenticated author.

SubscribedArticleListAPIView

Return approved articles from subscribed publishers and journalists.

  • get_queryset: Build a queryset limited to approved articles from the user's subscriptions.

ArticleRetrieveUpdateDestroyAPIView

Retrieve, update, or delete a single article through the API.

  • get_object: Return the selected article only when the current user may view it.
  • update: Update an article while preserving the journalist re-approval workflow.
  • destroy: Delete an article when the current user is authorised to remove it.

ApproveArticleAPIView

Approve an article through a dedicated API endpoint.

  • post: Mark the selected article as approved and return the updated payload.

NewsletterListAPIView

List newsletters that can be accessed by authenticated users.

ApprovedArticleLogCreateAPIView

Create or update approved article log entries for downstream integrations.

  • create: Create a log entry or update the existing one for the same article.

Functions

  • register_view: Allow users to create an account and get auto-assigned to the right group.
  • dashboard_view: Display featured articles, newsletters, and editor review items.
  • article_list_view: Show the list of approved articles available to signed-in users.
  • article_detail_view: Display a single article when the current user is allowed to view it.
  • article_create_view: Create a new article from the web interface.
  • article_update_view: Edit an existing article while enforcing role-based restrictions.
  • article_delete_view: Delete an article when the current user has permission.
  • review_articles_view: List pending articles for editors to review.
  • approve_article_view: Approve a pending article from the web interface.
  • newsletter_list_view: Show all newsletters with their linked articles and authors.
  • newsletter_create_view: Create a newsletter from selected articles.

News 24/7
